name: Computer Use
description: macOS-only — universal background desktop control via cua-driver. Registers a single `computer_use` tool (capture / click / type / scroll / key / set_value / list_apps / focus_app) that drives any macOS app WITHOUT stealing the user's cursor, keyboard focus, or Space. Vision models get set-of-mark captures — a plain screenshot plus an indexed element list (numbers NOT drawn on the image); text-only models drive via the accessibility tree. Requires the cua-driver binary: `oc computer-use install`.
author: OpenComputer
